Before UP: `bbSS` (blue border + sky blue fill)
After UP: `bbbb` (all blue)
So the marker colors changed from `bbSS` to `bbbb`. The marker position stayed the same but the color changed.
Let me now track all the changes:
1. Initial: `bbSS` at right end
2. RIGHT: `SSbb` (swapped colors)
3. RIGHT: (need to check)
4. LEFT: `bbSS` moved left
5. UP: `bbbb` (all blue)
So UP changed the marker color. Let me try DOWN to see if it changes it differently.
Actually, let me think about this more systematically. The marker seems to have 2x2 or 4x4 dimensions. Let me look at the exact pattern:
- `bbSS` = blue-blue on left, sky-blue-sky-blue on right (2x4 block)
- `SSbb` = sky-blue-sky-blue on left, blue-blue on right (2x4 block)
- `bbbb` = all blue
And the marker moves along the gray bar with LEFT/RIGHT and changes color with UP/DOWN.
Let me also check: the marker is 4 rows tall (lines 19-22) and 4 columns wide.
Let me try DOWN to see what color it changes to.
